tasks.label: Docs: Stop Local Server
args: $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($connections) { $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Stopped process(es) on port 3000.' } else { Write-Host 'No process listening on port 3000.' }
